title: lathyrus laevigatus subsp. occidentalis
intro: Lathyrus laevigatus subsp. occidentalis, commonly known as the western smooth pea or western pea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus laevigatus subsp. occidentalis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce muscle spasms, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
